title: tab@'el #2870
definition:
Tabeal = "God is good"

 1) a man whose son was either in the army of Pekah or the army of
    Rezin and whom Pekah and Rezin proposed to make king of Israel

 Tabeel = "God is good"

 2) an officer of the Persian government in Samaria in the reign of
    Artaxerxes
